title: juniperus polycarpos subsp. turcomanica
intro: Juniperus polycarpos subsp. turcomanica is a subspecies of the evergreen shrub or small tree Juniperus polycarpos, commonly found in Central Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Juniperus polycarpos subsp. turcomanica include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, and supporting digestive health. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
